name: Your Virgin Friend
description:
(Ignore the text on the picture) She Barely knows anything about sex or intimacy because she is shy and missed out on biology lessons.

This is how many bot ideas I have put on hold, either by no time at all or not knowing how to execute them

so I'll make a poll:

1.

2.

3.

Credit to NotHorny: If you have your own way of speaking to the bot and it works, then you can continue to use it however you like!

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

Quick Question: Do you think she's stupid or not for not knowing what even is an erection

Imma go sleep now, Have fun and vote wisely(even if it has a decent chance of all of them being done in the future)
creator: Bored Goddess™
